job_description:
Office Administrator

Employment Type: Contract, Full-time Location: Kochi, India Working Days: 6 days a week (9:30 AM to 6:30 PM)

Your Mission:

  • Oversee and ensure the efficient execution of housekeeping services.
  • Perform key secretarial and administrative responsibilities with precision.
  • Manage relationships with vendors and coordinate essential services.
  • Accurately process invoices for the administrative department.
  • Handle procurement and distribution of corporate gifts.
  • Facilitate guest receptions and ensure a seamless visitor experience.
  • Collaborate with the building team to address office-related matters.
  • Coordinate with various departments as needed to support operations.
  • Oversee maintenance contracts (AMC) for office equipment and services.
  • Ensure the cleanliness and upkeep of office premises.
  • Manage front office operations and courier services.
  • Assist the HR team in organizing and executing corporate events.

Your Profile:

  • Proficient in overseeing office environments to ensure safety and efficiency.
  • Highly organized with a proven ability to manage multiple administrative tasks effectively.
  • Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written, with a professional approach.
  • Proficient in using MIS for data analysis and reporting purposes.
  • Skilled in fostering and maintaining productive vendor relationships.
  • Strong ability to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines with efficiency.
  • Analytical mindset to identify challenges and implement appropriate solutions.
  • Proven capacity to collaborate with cross-functional teams and departments.
  • Meticulous in ensuring accuracy and thoroughness in all administrative functions and documentation.

We Offer:

  • Stylish office and modern infrastructure at Infopark Kochi.
  • Work-life balance.
  • Additional employee benefits, including parental health insurance.
  • Motivated and enthusiastic team.
  • Agile organizational structure which offers a lot of creative leeway.
  • Reliable employer with more than 25 years of experience.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at recruitment.india@financial.com.
summary: Seeking an Office Administrator to manage administrative tasks, coordinate vendor relationships, and support cross-departmental operations in a modern Kochi office with competitive benefits.

job_description:
Responsibilities

  • Follow and improve the QA standards defined by the company.
  • Perform daily backend server testing to ensure system stability and reliability.
  • Utilize and enhance existing QA server tools for functional verification.
  • Conduct backend server testing through both manual and automated approaches using testing frameworks or programmatic methods.
  • Verify and monitor the performance of backend services.
  • Analyze test results and report findings as Jira issues in collaboration with the development team.

Qualifications

  • Proven experience in backend server testing.
  • Strong programming knowledge in Java or Python is a must.
  • Hands-on experience with Linux commands and file permissions.
  • Good understanding of API testing.
  • Familiarity with console-based editors such as vi / vim.
  • Knowledge of networking tools like Netstat, Telnet, and Wireshark for investigation and testing.
  • Basic understanding of networking concepts such as HTTP/2, TLS/SSL and Proxy settings.
  • Basic knowledge of database testing; exposure to Big Data or Machine Learning is an added advantage.
  • Basic knowledge of financial markets and data is an added advantage.
  • Excellent communication skills in English (written and verbal).

We Offer

  • Stylish office and modern infrastructure at Infopark Kochi.
  • Work-life balance.
  • Opportunity for short-term onsite trips to Germany for tenured employees.
  • Additional employee benefits, including health insurance for family (spouse and 2 children).

  • Agile organizational structure which offers a lot of creative leeway.
  • Reliable employer with more than 25 years of experience.

How to Apply

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at recruitment.india@financial.com.
summary: Seeking a Software Automation Tester with backend testing expertise in Java/Python to ensure system stability through manual and automated methods in an agile environment.

company: Planet Media India ( PMIN Agency Pvt.Ltd.)
job_description:
UI Developer

Job Summary We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Junior UI/HTML Developer to join our team. The candidate will be responsible for converting UI/UX designs into responsive web pages, supporting front-end development activities, and ensuring a seamless user experience across devices and browsers.

Key Responsibilities - Develop responsive web pages using HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript. - Convert Figma/PSD/XD designs into functional and pixel-perfect web pages. - Ensure cross-browser and cross-device compatibility. - Assist in creating reusable UI components and layouts. - Maintain consistency in design implementation, typography, spacing, and branding. - Optimize web pages for performance and loading speed. - Collaborate with UI/UX designers and development teams during project execution. - Identify and fix UI-related bugs and issues. - Update website content and implement design modifications as required. - Follow coding standards, project guidelines, and version control practices. - Assist senior developers with front-end development tasks. - Ensure websites are user-friendly and accessible.

Required Skills and Qualifications - Basic knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript. - Familiarity with responsive web design principles. - Ability to convert Figma designs into responsive web pages. - Understanding of cross-browser compatibility and debugging. - Knowledge of Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, or similar frameworks is an advantage. - Basic understanding of Git/version control systems. - Strong attention to detail and UI consistency. - Good problem-solving and communication skills. - Ability to work effectively in a team environment. - Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies.

Educational Qualification - Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, Web Design, or a related field. - Freshers with strong front-end/UI development knowledge are encouraged to apply. - Internship or academic project experience in front-end development will be an added advantage.

Experience - 0–1 year of experience in UI/HTML or front-end development. - Freshers can also apply.

Preferred Skills - Basic knowledge of JavaScript frameworks/libraries is a plus. - Understanding of UI/UX principles and web accessibility. - Familiarity with CMS platforms or website builders is an added advantage.

Contact If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at hr@planetmedia.in.
summary: Junior UI Developer needed to convert designs into responsive web pages, ensuring cross-browser compatibility and collaborating with teams. Requires HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript skills with 0-1 years of experience.

job_title: Immediate Opening for Legal Assistant Manager
job_description:
Job Title: In-house Legal Assistant Manager Location: Chennai Work Mode: Hybrid Experience: Minimum 6 years Employment Type: Full Time

Role Overview: We are seeking a qualified and experienced Assistant Manager – Legal to join Aspire Systems’ in-house legal team at Chennai, India. The role involves managing a broad range of legal matters with a primary focus on US, UK, and EU commercial contracts, Intellectual Property licensing, regulatory compliance, and data protection laws. The resource will be working in the UK shift.

Key Responsibilities: - Contract Lifecycle Management: Draft, review, and negotiate contracts including software license agreements, IT services agreements, partner/reseller agreements. Ensure alignment with internal risk policies and legal requirements. - Intellectual Property & Technology Law: Manage the company’s IP portfolio (software copyrights, trademarks). Support product/engineering teams with IP strategy, open-source compliance, and technology licensing. - Regulatory Compliance & Risk Management: Monitor IT, IP, and data protection laws (e.g., GDPR, DPDP Act). Conduct legal risk assessments and support compliance programs. - Legal Advisory & Dispute Resolution: Advise stakeholders on legal issues related to business operations and technology transactions. - Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work with technology, procurement, HR, marketing, and finance teams to provide legal guidance. - Training Support: Deliver legal training on regulatory developments.

Required Skills: - In-depth knowledge of IP laws, contract law, IT Act, and data privacy frameworks (GDPR, DPDP) - Proven experience in tech contracts and software licensing - Strong communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills - Ability to handle complex legal matters independently

Good to Have: - LL.B. from a recognized university (LL.M. in Contracts/Technology/Intellectual Property Law preferred) - Minimum 7 years of experience, preferably in an in-house legal department within the IT/tech sector

About Aspire Systems: Aspire Systems is a $180+ million global tech firm with 4,900+ employees, serving 275+ active customers. Founded in 1996, it operates across 10+ global regions and is recognized as one of India’s 100 Best Companies to Work For.

Why Join Aspire Systems? - Future-ready workplace with emerging tech projects - Hybrid work model and global collaboration - Emphasis on innovation, diversity, and career growth

Diversity & Inclusion: We foster a culture that values diverse perspectives and backgrounds.

Privacy Notice: Candidate data is handled securely and retained only as required by law.

Disclaimer: Job duties may evolve; management reserves the right to adjust responsibilities.

Contact: For applications, email your resume to anandhi.alamuthu@aspiresys.com.
summary: Seeking an experienced Legal Assistant Manager in Chennai to manage contracts, IP, and compliance for a global tech firm.

job_description:
ERP QA Analyst

We are seeking a detail-oriented ERP QA Analyst to perform comprehensive testing before the official release of our ERP software. The tester will ensure that all modules function correctly, workflows meet business requirements, and the software is free of critical bugs, providing a seamless experience for clients.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Conduct thorough pre-release testing of ERP modules, including Finance, Sales, Inventory, HR, and Manufacturing.
  • Perform functional, regression, integration, and system testing to identify defects.
  • Document and report issues clearly using bug-tracking tools.
  • Validate that ERP workflows align with client and business requirements.
  • Collaborate closely with developers and project teams to resolve issues quickly.
  • Prepare detailed test cases, test plans, and test reports for management review.
  • Suggest improvements to enhance software quality and user experience.

Qualifications & Skills:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field.
  • Minimum 2 years of experience in software testing, preferably with ERP systems.
  • Strong understanding of ERP workflows and business processes.
  • Excellent analytical, documentation, and problem-solving skills.
  • Attention to detail and a proactive approach to quality assurance.

Why Join Us:

  • Play a critical role in ensuring high-quality ERP software releases.
  • Collaborate with a skilled team and gain exposure to multiple ERP modules.
  • Contribute directly to client satisfaction and software excellence.

Job Type:

Full-time

Work Location:

In person

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at hr@eqsoftglobal.com.
summary: Ensures ERP software quality through comprehensive testing, collaborating with teams to resolve issues and enhance user experience.

job_description:
Odoo Developer

We are seeking an Odoo Developer with 1+ year of hands-on experience in developing, customizing, and maintaining Odoo applications. The role involves collaborating with functional teams to deliver efficient ERP solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop, customize, and maintain Odoo modules based on business requirements.
  • Create new modules and enhance existing Odoo applications.
  • Design backend functionalities using Python.
  • Work with PostgreSQL database and optimize queries.
  • Develop and integrate REST APIs and third-party services.
  • Customize Odoo views, reports, workflows, and business logic.
  • Troubleshoot and fix bugs in existing applications.
  • Collaborate with QA and functional teams for testing and deployment.
  • Write clean, reusable, and maintainable code.
  • Participate in code reviews and follow coding standards.

Required Skills

  • 1+ year of experience in Odoo development.
  • Strong Python programming knowledge.
  • Experience with Odoo framework and custom module development.
  • Good understanding of PostgreSQL.
  • Experience with XML, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
  • Knowledge of REST APIs and third-party integrations.
  • Familiarity with Git version control.
  • Understanding of Odoo ORM and MVC architecture.
  • Strong debugging and problem-solving skills.

Contact: Email your resume to joinus@pearlsofttechnologies.com.
summary: Seeking an Odoo Developer with 1+ year of experience to develop, customize, and maintain Odoo modules using Python and PostgreSQL. Responsibilities include API integration, database optimization, and collaboration with functional teams for ERP solutions.

job_description:
Senior Software Engineer - .NET Core

Job Purpose: Be a Senior Software Engineer in Web API development using .NET.

Job Description: - Expertise in developing .NET Core based web applications with RDBMS or NoSQL database back-end. - Experience in working with Entity Framework Core, LINQ, Blazor, ASP.NET Identity, etc. - Good working exposure with REST API and very strong knowledge in object-oriented concepts & design patterns. - Expertise in reviewing PR’s and test coverage of the unit tests. - Experience in developing static code analyzer. - Experience in working with cloud services like AWS Lambda, SNS, Azure Functions, etc., provided by AWS, Azure, Google, etc. - Experience in working with microservices architecture. Proficiency in code versioning tools like GIT and SVN. - Good understanding and working knowledge on project tracking tools like JIRA, Azure DevOps, and project collaboration tools like Confluence, etc. - Excellent communication skills to convey ideas with clarity, depth, and details. - Prepare process and design documentation for implemented solutions. - Experience in Scrum Agile development mode, active participation in sprint ceremonies, and leading them in the absence of the Scrum Master.

Nice to Have: - Experience in working with identity providers like IdentityServer, Auth0, Keycloak, etc. - Take full ownership of tasks/user stories committed by self/team. - Lead role in managing tasks in a sprint, reviewing code, and ensuring first-time quality. - Capability to translate user stories into technical specifications and working code. - Follow modern agile processes including TDD-based unit testing and guide the team. - Troubleshoot, test, and maintain core product software and databases for optimization and functionality. - Contribute to all phases of the development lifecycle. - Educate and review technology best practices in the team. - Follow industry trends and pilot tools to scale technical capabilities. - Collaborate with Technical Architects to define solution/technical architecture. - Excellent analytical skills to analyze requirements, identify gaps, and propose solutions. - Identify and split tasks for user stories, considering technical aspects and NFRs. - Provide task estimations and accountability for completion. - Mentor junior team members on technology, task management, and code quality. - Initiate best practices in respective technology areas. - Identify challenges and conduct PoCs/feasibility studies.

Additional Information: - Participate in the full product development cycle, including brainstorming, release planning, code reviews, MVP/releases, QA, and support. - Thrive in dynamic environments with proactive communication and technical leadership. - Adhere to ISMS policies and procedures.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, share your updated resume at remi.thomas@experionglobal.com.
summary: Senior Software Engineer with expertise in .NET Core, cloud services, and agile methodologies. Leads teams, ensures code quality, and drives technical best practices.

job_description:
Company: KENLAND IT SOLUTIONS (P) Ltd Address: 3rd & 5th FLOORS, M SQUARED BUILDING, ANNEX 2, TECHNOPARK CAMPUS, KARIYAVATTOM, TRIVANDRUM, KERALA, 695581 Website: https://www.kenland.in Job Title: Lead Generation Executive (Marketing) Closing Date: 15, June 2026 Published Date: 25, May 2026 Contact Email: recruiter@kenland.in

Job Summary

We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Lead Generation Specialist to join our expanding sales and marketing team. The ideal candidate will have at least 1 year of experience in the software/IT industry, with a proven track record of identifying, qualifying, and nurturing leads through outbound and inbound channels. You will play a pivotal role in building a robust pipeline of prospects for our sales team.

  • Familiarity with CRM software (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot)
  • Experience with lead generation tools such as LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, ZoomInfo, etc.
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team
  • Goal-oriented with strong organizational and time management skills

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience working with SaaS products or B2B software sales
  • Understanding of sales funnels and pipeline management
  • Knowledge of email automation and campaign tools (e.g., Mailchimp, Lemlist)

Employment Type: Full-Time
tags: Lead Generation Tools (LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo)

job_description:
TILTLABS CONSULTANCY SERVICES (P) Ltd

QA Engineer

job_title: Lead (Full Stack - FE / BE / React) with Optimizely
job_description:
Reflections Info Systems (P) Ltd

Location: 9A2, Carnival Technopark, Kariyavattom P.O, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India, 695581 Website: www.reflectionsglobal.com Contact Email: Careers@reflectionsinfos.com Closing Date: 29, May 2026 Job Published: 25, May 2026

Role Overview

We are seeking a Lead (Full Stack - FE / BE / React) with Optimizely to lead a B2B migration project from SAP ECC to Optimizely. The role requires 8+ years of experience and a blend of technical expertise, leadership, and integration skills.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the full lifecycle of the B2B to Optimizely migration project (planning to deployment).
  • Develop scalable, secure, and maintainable full-stack solutions.
  • Collaborate with architects, business analysts, QA, and DevOps teams.
  • Design and implement RESTful APIs for SAP ECC and Optimizely integration.
  • Ensure cross-browser performance and responsive application design.
  • Integrate and optimize PIM (Product Information Management) and Spire systems.
  • Implement CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions.
  • Provide technical leadership and mentor junior developers.

Preferred Skills

Front-End (React)

  • React.js (Hooks, Context API) for component-based UIs.
  • JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5/CSS3/SASS for responsive design.
  • State management (Redux/React Query) and RESTful API integration.
  • Cross-browser compatibility and performance optimization.

Back-End (.NET)

  • .NET Core/C# for scalable services and APIs.
  • Entity Framework/LINQ for data access.
  • RESTful API design and authentication (OAuth2, JWT).
  • SQL Server/PostgreSQL database modeling.

Architecture & Integration

  • Optimizely/EPIServer platform expertise.
  • SAP ECC data models (MARA, KNA1, VBAK).
  • Middleware integration (Azure Logic Apps, MuleSoft, Boomi).
  • Microservices architecture and CI/CD pipelines.
  • PIM/Spire system integration.

Leadership & Collaboration

  • Translate business requirements into technical solutions.
  • Conduct code reviews and mentor developers.
  • Lead Agile sprints, backlog management, and stand-ups.

Secondary Skills

  • UI frameworks (Material UI, Tailwind CSS).
  • Accessibility (WCAG) and test automation awareness.
  • GraphQL, message queues (RabbitMQ, Azure Service Bus), and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Monitoring (ELK stack, Application Insights) and security compliance (GDPR).

Application Instructions

Interested candidates should email their resumes to Careers@reflectionsinfos.com with notice period, current, and expected CTC details.

Important Notice: Reflections Info Systems does not charge fees for job applications. All communications are via official email or LinkedIn. Report suspicious activity to Careers@reflectionsinfos.com.
summary: Lead full-stack migration from SAP ECC to Optimizely, requiring 8+ years of experience in React, .NET Core, and integration expertise with technical leadership.

job_description:
Job Description

Company: Reflections Info Systems (P) Ltd Location: 9A2, Carnival Technopark, Kariyavattom P.O, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India, 695581 Website: Reflections Global Closing Date: 29, May 2026 Job Published: 25, May 2026 Contact Email: Careers@reflectionsinfos.com

Brief Description

We are seeking candidates with 5+ years of experience for this role.

Key Responsibilities

  • Salesforce Platform Knowledge: Proficiency in Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud, and custom objects.
  • Testing Types: Execute functional, regression, UAT, API (REST/SOAP), and integration testing.
  • Automation Tools: Utilize Selenium and Playwright for test automation.
  • Apex Testing: Validate triggers, classes, and batch jobs.
  • SOQL/SOSL: Write queries to validate Salesforce data.
  • Data Management: Experience with Data Loader and Workbench for data loading.
  • Test Management: Use Jira, Xray, and Zephyr for test case management.
  • Agile/DevOps Practices: Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitHub Actions).
  • Collaboration: Work with admins, developers, and business users to clarify requirements.
  • Test Strategy: Define and execute QA strategies, test plans, and scenarios for Salesforce implementations.
  • Test Case Development: Create and maintain manual and automated test cases for configurations, customizations, and integrations.
  • Defect Management: Log and manage defects using JIRA/Azure DevOps.
  • Automation Frameworks: Implement and enhance frameworks (e.g., Selenium, Provar, Copado) integrated with CI/CD pipelines.

Preferred Skills

  • Education: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
  • Experience: 4-6+ years in QA and 5+ years in Salesforce applications.
  • Agile Development: Experience in Agile/Scrum teams, sprint planning, and estimation.

Application Instructions

Interested candidates should send their resumes to Careers@reflectionsinfos.com with notice period, current, and expected CTC details.

Important Notice: Reflections Info Systems does not charge any fees for job applications. All communications are via official website, LinkedIn, or the HR email. For clarifications, contact Careers@reflectionsinfos.com.
summary: QA professional with 5+ years of experience in Salesforce automation testing, utilizing tools like Selenium and Jira to ensure high-quality releases through Agile/DevOps practices.

job_description:
Reflections Info Systems (P) Ltd 9A2, Carnival Technopark, Kariyavattom P.O, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India, 695581 www.reflectionsglobal.com

Senior AI Security & Governance Engineer Closing Date: 29, May 2026 Job Published: 25, May 2026 Contact Email: Careers@reflectionsinfos.com

Introduction

We are seeking a Senior AI Security & Governance Engineer to embed responsible AI controls directly into runtime systems. This role demands strong technical depth and risk judgment, not policy documentation. The engineer will protect the enterprise while enabling innovation.

Responsibilities

  • Design and implement:
  • Prompt filtering
  • Output validation
  • Misuse protection
  • Enforce AI governance through code and automation
  • Build audit, traceability, and control mechanisms
  • Define safety patterns used across all AI agents
  • Advise on AI risk scenarios and failure modes

Preferred Skills

Primary Skills: - 5–8 years of engineering experience - Strong Python/scripting - Experience with: - Security or governance-related systems - Policy-as-code or rule engines - Strong understanding of: - AI risks (hallucinations, prompt injection, data leakage) - Enterprise compliance mindset

Secondary Skills: - Saviynt/ServiceNow/IAM/approval workflows - Responsible AI or model risk frameworks

Application Instructions

Interested candidates should send detailed resumes to Careers@reflectionsinfos.com with notice period, current, and expected CTC details. Important: No payment is ever sought for jobs at Reflections. All communications are via official channels. For clarifications, contact Careers@reflectionsinfos.com.

Fraud Alert: Beware of fraudsters claiming to represent Reflections Info Systems for a fee. We do not solicit payments for job applications.
summary: Senior AI Security & Governance Engineer to embed responsible AI controls into runtime systems. Requires 5–8 years of experience, Python, and expertise in AI risks and policy-as-code.

job_title: Business Development Executive / Digital Marketing Executive (Minimum 6+ Months Experience)
job_description:
Company: Globcom Solutions (P) Ltd Location: Module 2502, 5th Floor, Yamuna Building, Technopark Phase -3, Thiruvananthapuram, 695583 Website: www.globcomsolution.com Job Title: Business Development Executive / Digital Marketing Executive Closing Date: 15 June 2026 Published Date: 25 May 2026 Contact Email: rajesh@globcomsolution.com

Brief Description

We are seeking a smart, energetic, and result-oriented Digital Marketing Executive with hands-on experience in client onboarding, digital marketing, lead generation, and business communication. The ideal candidate must confidently handle clients, generate business opportunities, and execute digital marketing strategies.

Key Responsibilities

  • Onboard new clients and local businesses for digital marketing services
  • Generate leads via direct visits, calls, networking, and online platforms
  • Manage client communication, follow-ups, and relationships
  • Execute SEO, SMO, social media ads, and Google Ads campaigns
  • Create and manage Google Business Profiles
  • Plan social media marketing campaigns and conduct market research
  • Coordinate with design/development teams for project execution
  • Achieve monthly targets and ensure customer satisfaction

Required Skills

  • Minimum 6 months experience in Digital Marketing/Business Development
  • Proficiency in SEO, SMO, Social Media Marketing, Google Ads, Lead Generation, Client Handling
  • Ability to visit and interact with local clients
  • Valid two-wheeler driving license
  • Strong communication and convincing skills
  • Fluency in Malayalam and English
  • Basic understanding of branding and online promotions
  • Self-motivated and target-oriented mindset

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience onboarding local businesses/brands
  • Familiarity with Meta Ads, Google Ads, Canva, social media tools, and CRM
  • Background in digital marketing agencies or IT companies
  • Passion for sales, marketing, and business growth

Work Details

  • Location: Technopark (Trivandrum)
  • Working Hours: 9:30 AM – 6:30 PM
  • Work Mode: On-site
  • Minimum Commitment: 6 Months

Benefits

  • Attractive salary + incentives
  • Career growth opportunities

job_description:
Nissan Digital India LLP

Location: #2101, 1st Floor, Yamuna Building, Technopark Phase-III, Trivandrum, Kerala, India, 695583 Website: http://www.nissandigitalindia.com Job Title: Lead Network Engineer Closing Date: 08, June 2026 Published: 25, May 2026 Contact Email: arun.alex@nissanmotor.com

Brief Description

As a Lead Network Engineer, you should possess capability for managing and designing the network infrastructure, including but not limited to, installation, setup/configuration, troubleshooting, tuning, and maintenance of networking and related equipment as defined in the tender. Should have technical expertise to design, manage deployment and maintenance of IT network infrastructure, including but not limited to, administration of appropriate access protection, audit control, system recovery methods and procedures, prevention of breaches, awareness training, etc.

Position Description

We are seeking a creative, passionate, and experienced leader of both people and technology for the position of Lead Network Engineer with 10 to 15 years of experience in Network Administration and Network Security.

Responsibilities

  • Manage and administer Palo Alto firewall environments in line with IT security policy
  • Manage and administer Cisco WSA
  • Manage Cisco Core Switches and HP Wireless system
  • Monitor network performance, troubleshoot network problems and outages, schedule upgrades
  • Secure network systems by establishing and enforcing policies and defining/monitoring access
  • Undertake data network fault investigations in local and wide area environments using information from multiple sources
  • Manage network uptime and maintain SLA within permissible limits
  • Ensure adherence to the change management system and document/approve all network infrastructure changes

Mandatory Skills

  • Strong expertise in Enterprise Routing and Switching Environment, 3-layer Network Architecture, Wireless Networks (Cisco/Aruba)
  • Knowledge of data network equipment software/version upgrades to latest stable firmware releases
  • Proficient in firewall administration (Palo Alto, Cisco FTD/ASA)
  • Hands-on experience in Cisco Iron Port proxy servers
  • Experience with network configuration management and monitoring tools

Competency Requirements

  • Good communication skills, analytical and problem-solving abilities
  • Strong planning, organizing, and time management skills

Mandatory Certifications

  • Cisco Certification: CCNA/CCNP
  • Palo Alto Certification: PCNSA/PCNSE

Qualifications

  • B.E / B.Tech / MCA
summary: Lead Network Engineer with 10-15 years of experience in designing, managing, and securing enterprise networks using Cisco and Palo Alto technologies.

job_description:
Company Info

About the Role

We are seeking a high-energy, tech-forward Digital Marketing Executive with 1–2 years of experience in IT/SaaS or service-based companies. At Storygame, we leverage AI to build our entire workflow, and you’ll lead our AI-driven growth by scaling content production, managing SEO/AEO, and automating marketing funnels.   • Marketing Automation: Design workflows (Zapier/Make) for social media distribution and lead nurturing.
  • Performance Tracking: Analyze content performance via Google Analytics and Looker Studio.

Full-time, Permanent

  • Paid time off

In-person

job_description:
Company: TKey Education Solutions (P) Ltd [Arbor] Location: 3rd Floor, M Squared Building, Annex 1, Technopark Campus, Karyavattom, Trivandrum, Kerala, 695581 Closing Date: 02 June 2026 Published Date: 25 May 2026 Contact Email: deepa.nair@arbor-education.com

Job Description

The Technical Engineering Manager provides hands-on technical leadership, line management, and delivery oversight for a single team. Reporting to an Engineering Manager (EM), this role ensures the performance and technical excellence of an engineering team transitioning to AI-augmented workflows. You will lead the team in leveraging AI agents to maximize productivity while maintaining architectural integrity, security, and code quality.

Key Responsibilities

1. Technical Anchor

  • Hands-on Technical Leadership: Lead by example with deep engagement in the codebase, addressing complex challenges and setting high standards for best practices.
  • Architectural Integrity: Own team-level architecture, ensuring scalable, maintainable solutions aligned with global engineering standards.
  • Practical AI Application: Guide the team in applying AI tools to improve efficiency, balancing innovation with technical rigor.

2. Line Management & People Development

  • Mentorship & Coaching: Provide direct line management, supporting engineers' professional growth and career milestones.
  • High-Performance Culture: Foster accountability through 1-on-1s, Skills Matrices, and talent identification.
  • Recruitment: Lead technical interviews to attract top-tier engineering talent.

3. Product & Portfolio Alignment

  • Roadmap Execution: Collaborate with Product Managers to translate portfolio-level roadmaps into actionable technical plans.
  • Continuous Improvement: Use data to refine workflows, identify bottlenecks, and implement solutions.
  • Resource Optimization: Manage capacity and technical resourcing to meet delivery commitments without compromising code quality.

Preferred Skills

  • Experience: Minimum 5 years in software engineering, including 1+ year leading teams of 5+ engineers.
  • Architectural Stewardship: Proven ability to design scalable systems and enforce global standards.
  • Analytical Mindset: Proficiency in data-driven improvements to workflows and quality.
  • AI Literacy: Understanding of AI tools to enhance productivity and code quality.
  • Communication: Bridge technical execution with portfolio-level product roadmaps.

Work Mode

Hybrid (3 days/week in Trivandrum office).

Application Instructions

Send updated CV to deepa.nair@arbor-education.com with subject line TEM-01 and include: - Total Years of Experience - Relevant Years of Experience - Current CTC - Expected CTC - Notice Period - Reason for Change - Willingness to work from Trivandrum office
summary: Lead an AI-augmented engineering team with hands-on technical expertise, team management, and product alignment. Requires 5+ years of software engineering experience and AI integration skills.

job_description:
Senior Data Analyst

DeviceDriven (India) Pvt. Ltd Location: Padmanabham, Technopark Campus, Trivandrum, 695581 Website: http://www.devicedriven.com Closing Date: 15, June 2026 Published: 25, May 2026 Contact Email: jobs@devicedriven.com

About the Opportunity

We are seeking a Senior Data Analyst who can own end-to-end data pipelines, ensure reporting accuracy at scale, and act as a trusted data partner to product, engineering, and business teams. The platform processes high-volume transactional, behavioral, and partner data that powers business intelligence, operational reporting, reconciliation, and analytics for internal teams and external stakeholders. This role goes beyond dashboarding—you will design ETL workflows, influence data models, troubleshoot production issues, and mentor junior analysts in a complex, enterprise environment.

Role Overview

As a Senior Data Analyst, you will: - Own and evolve enterprise-grade ETL pipelines and BI solutions - Ensure data quality, consistency, and performance across platforms - Design and deliver trusted reporting and analytics used for operational and business decisions - Partner with engineering, DBAs, and cloud teams on data architecture and optimization - Act as a senior point of escalation for data issues and reporting correctness - Guide best practices and mentor junior team members

Key Responsibilities

  1. ETL Architecture & Data Engineering
  2. Architect, design, and maintain complex SSIS ETL pipelines across multiple data sources
  3. Own data ingestion, transformation, and validation logic for large-scale datasets
  4. Optimize ETL performance for volume, reliability, and recoverability
  5. Implement robust data quality checks, reconciliation logic, and audit controls
  6. Lead troubleshooting and root-cause analysis for production data issues

  7. Support data migrations, platform integrations, and schema evolution

  8. Business Intelligence & Analytics

  9. Design and maintain enterprise-grade SSRS reports used by business and operations teams
  10. Build and govern Power BI datasets and dashboards with consistent metrics and definitions
  11. Design and maintain SSAS cubes for multi-dimensional and historical analysis
  12. Ensure KPI definitions, aggregations, and calculations are accurate and aligned

  13. Partner with stakeholders to translate business questions into analytics solutions

  14. Cloud, Automation & Integrations

  15. Design and implement Python-based automation for data processing and monitoring
  16. Work with GCP services including BigQuery, Cloud Functions, Cloud Scheduler, and Secret Manager
  17. Automate data pipelines, report refreshes, and operational checks
  18. Integrate third-party systems via APIs (e.g., JIRA, Zendesk, Matomo)

  19. Support hybrid architectures spanning on-prem and cloud environments

  20. Leadership, Support & Collaboration

  21. Act as a senior escalation point for data and reporting issues
  22. Collaborate with DBAs on query optimization, indexing, and performance tuning
  23. Participate in production support and on-call rotations as required
  24. Define and maintain documentation, standards, and best practices
  25. Mentor junior analysts and review their ETL and reporting work
  26. Contribute to data governance, naming standards, and metric definitions

Preferred Skills

Core Technical Skills - SQL Server / T-SQL: Expert-level querying, optimization, stored procedures, indexing - SSIS: 5+ years designing and owning complex, production ETL pipelines - SSRS: Strong experience building operational and executive-level reports - Power BI: Advanced dashboarding, data modeling, and DAX usage - Python: Data processing, automation, and scripting for analytics workflows

Experience - 8–12+ years in Data Analytics, BI Development, or Data Engineering roles - Proven experience owning enterprise data platforms end-to-end - Experience working with high-volume transactional systems - Strong production support and incident troubleshooting experience - Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments

Education - Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Science, or related field - Or equivalent hands-on professional experience

Preferred Qualifications - SSAS cube design and MDX query experience - Experience with GCP (BigQuery, Cloud Functions, Cloud Scheduler) - Experience with Git / GitHub version control - Background in fintech, loyalty, rewards, or high-transaction platforms - Microsoft certifications in SQL Server, Power BI, or related data technologies

Application Instructions: Send your resume, GitHub/LinkedIn profile, and a short note about your interest to: jobs@devicedriven.com
summary: Senior Data Analyst role at DeviceDriven requires 8–12+ years of experience in ETL, BI, and data engineering. Responsibilities include designing data pipelines, ensuring reporting accuracy, and mentoring junior analysts using SQL Server, Power BI, and GCP.

job_description:
Senior Back End Engineer - Node.js

Company: iBoson Innovations (P) Ltd Location: ACE 1, 3rd Floor, CDAC Building, Technopark Campus, Kazhakootam, Thiruvananthapuram, 695581 Website: www.iboson.io Closing Date: 31 May 2026 Contact Email: career@ibosoninnov.com

About the Role

At iBoson, we push the boundaries of Augmented Reality (AR) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) to build next-gen solutions. We are expanding our team and seeking a skilled Node.js Developer to develop robust, scalable, and high-performance backend systems for our products.

Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain scalable server-side applications using Node.js.
  • Develop and integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services.
  • Optimize back-end processes for performance, security, and scalability.
  • Collaborate with front-end developers to integrate user-facing elements.
  • Manage and implement database solutions (SQL/NoSQL).
  • Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve back-end issues efficiently.
  • Follow best practices in code quality, testing, and documentation.

Preferred Skills

  • 5+ years of experience in back-end development with Node.js.
  • Strong understanding of JavaScript, TypeScript, and asynchronous programming.
  • Experience building and managing RESTful APIs and microservices architecture.
  • Proficiency in databases (MongoDB, MySQL, or PostgreSQL).
  • Strong grasp of OOP concepts.
  • Knowledge of authentication/authorization mechanisms (JWT, OAuth).
  • Experience with server-side frameworks like Express.js, Nest.js, or similar.
  • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure).
  • Understanding of Agile methodologies and CI/CD pipelines.
  • Exposure to AI integrations and AR technology is a plus.

What We Offer

  • Work-life balance with flexible timings.
  • Opportunities to work on challenging, high-impact projects.
  • Learning and career growth opportunities.
  • Collaborative, engineering-driven culture.

Join a team that thrives on innovation and problem-solving. At iBoson, you’ll work with emerging AR & AI technologies, contribute to impactful projects, and grow in a tech-driven environment. Apply now by sending your resume to career@ibosoninnov.com.
summary: Senior Node.js developer to build scalable backend systems for AR/AI projects. Requires 5+ years experience with Node.js, REST APIs, and databases.

job_description:
iBoson Innovations (P) Ltd

Address: ACE 1, 3rd Floor, CDAC Building, Technopark Campus, Kazhakootam, Thiruvananthapuram, 695581 Website: http://www.iboson.io

Full Stack Developer (Angular/React + Node.js)

Closing Date: 31 May 2026 Job Published: 25 May 2026 Contact Email: career@ibosoninnov.com

Brief Description

At iBoson, we push the boundaries of Augmented Reality (AR) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) to build next-gen solutions. We are expanding our team and looking for a skilled Node.js Developer to help develop robust, scalable, and high-performance backend systems for our products.

Responsibilities:

  • Design, development, and maintenance of both front-end and back-end web applications using Angular and Node.js.
  • Develop and integrate RESTful APIs services to support front-end applications and other backend services.
  • Optimize application performance, security, and reliability.
  • Design and manage databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, etc.).
  • Collaborate with frontend, product, and DevOps teams.
  • Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code.
  • Review code and mentor junior engineers.
  • Participate in architecture and technical decision-making.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve production issues.
  • Work closely with UX/UI designers, product managers, and QA teams to deliver outstanding user experiences and ensure project deadlines are met.

Preferred Skills/Requirements:

  • 5+ years of experience in full-stack development with strong proficiency in Angular, Node.js, and JavaScript/TypeScript.
  • Strong experience in backend development with Node.js, including building and integrating REST APIs, middleware, and microservices.
  • Extensive experience with front-end frameworks like Angular including component-driven architecture, state management, and UI performance optimization.
  • Experience with databases, both SQL (e.g., MySQL/PostgreSQL), including database design, query optimization, and migrations.
  • Expertise in version control systems, particularly Git, with an understanding of Git workflows and branching strategies.
  • Strong understanding of software design patterns, microservices architecture, and agile development methodologies (e.g., Scrum, Kanban).
  • Ability to write clean, maintainable, and efficient code with a focus on test-driven development (TDD) and continuous integration.
  • Experience with front-end optimization techniques, including bundling, lazy loading, code splitting, and caching.

What We Offer:

  • Work-life Balance – flexible work timings
  • Opportunity to work on challenging, high-impact projects
  • Learning and career growth opportunities
  • Collaborative and engineering-driven culture
  • Be part of a team that thrives on innovation and problem-solving. At iBoson, you’ll work with emerging AR & AI technologies, contribute to impactful projects, and grow in a collaborative and tech-driven environment.

Apply: Send your resume to career@ibosoninnov.com.
summary: iBoson seeks a Full Stack Developer with Angular/Node.js expertise to build scalable backend systems. Requires 5+ years experience in full-stack development and collaboration with cross-functional teams.

About the Role

We are seeking a dynamic, confident, and results-oriented Business Associate – Sales to join our growing team. This role is ideal for individuals passionate about sales, customer engagement, and building long-term client relationships. The successful candidate will drive revenue growth by connecting with prospective customers, promoting products/services, and converting leads into sales opportunities.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct outbound calls to potential and existing customers to introduce and promote company products/services.
  • Present product features, benefits, and pricing in a clear, professional, and persuasive manner.
  • Understand customer requirements and recommend appropriate solutions.
  • Address inquiries, provide accurate information, and resolve basic concerns.
  • Follow up with prospective clients to nurture leads and convert them into sales opportunities.
  • Build and maintain strong customer relationships to encourage repeat business and referrals.
  • Achieve individual sales targets and contribute to overall team performance.

Requirements

  • Experience: 0–1 year (Freshers welcome)
  • Immediate joiners preferred
  • Female candidates preferred
  • Fluency in Malayalam required
  • Willingness to work from the office
  • Salary: ₹13,000/month

Preferred Skills

  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Strong persuasion, negotiation, and customer-handling abilities
  • Self-motivated with a results-driven approach to sales
  • Ability to manage multiple leads and follow-ups effectively
summary: A Business Associate – Sales role focusing on outbound calls, lead conversion, and customer relationship building. Requires Malayalam fluency and immediate joiners.

job_description:
Trainonex Solutions (P) Ltd

Address: Ground Floor, Carnival Building, Technopark Campus, Karyavattom, Trivandrum, Kerala, 695581 Website: www.trainonexsolutions.in

Job Title: GRAPHIC DESIGNER (Freshers - Immediate Joiners)

Closing Date: 27, May 2026 Published Date: 23, May 2026 Contact Email: career@trainonexsolutions.com

Brief Description

We are seeking a creative and skilled Graphic Designer to join our team immediately. The ideal candidate should be proficient in designing visually engaging graphics and have strong skills in photo editing, reel creation, and video editing for digital platforms.

Key Responsibilities

  • Create high-quality graphics for social media, marketing materials, and digital campaigns.
  • Edit and design creative visuals using Adobe Photoshop.
  • Create and edit engaging short-form video content and reels.
  • Perform video editing for promotional and social media content.
  • Collaborate with the marketing and content team to develop creative concepts.
  • Ensure all designs follow brand guidelines and maintain visual consistency.
  • Deliver projects within deadlines while maintaining quality.

Salary: ₹12,000

Preferred Skills

  • Freshers are also welcome
  • Strong proficiency in Adobe Photoshop.
  • Experience in Reel editing and short-form video creation.
  • Good knowledge of video editing tools (Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar).
  • Strong creativity and attention to detail.
  • Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.
summary: Creative Graphic Designer needed for immediate joiners. Requires Adobe Photoshop, video editing, and reel creation skills with a focus on digital campaigns and brand consistency.
